# Federico López — Senior Frontend Engineer

> Senior Frontend Engineer with 16+ years of IT experience. Specializes in React, TypeScript, and Next.js. Based in Argentina. Available for remote opportunities worldwide. Work featured in The New York Times.

## About

Federico López is a Senior Frontend Engineer with 16+ years of total IT experience and 7+ years focused on modern frontend development. He builds high-performance, scalable, and accessible web applications for global companies in wellness, sports, fintech, and healthcare sectors — reaching millions of users worldwide.

His work was featured in The New York Times for building production-ready AI evaluation applications used to benchmark large language models at REAL Evals.

## Core Skills

- **Frontend**: React, TypeScript, Next.js, JavaScript (ES2024+)
- **UI Libraries**: Material UI, Chakra UI, Shadcn UI, Tailwind CSS
- **State Management**: Redux, Context API
- **Architecture**: Clean Architecture, Hexagonal Architecture, Atomic Design
- **Performance**: Server-Side Rendering (SSR), code splitting, Core Web Vitals optimization
- **Tools**: Storybook, Jest, React Testing Library
- **Methodologies**: Remote Agile, cross-functional teams, distributed collaboration

## Experience

- **Senior Frontend Engineer — Bonzzu** (Current): React/Next.js applications for Delos Company and RCX Sports. Reusable component systems, SSR, and performance optimization.
- **Frontend Web Developer — Freelance**: Clients include REAL Evals (featured in The New York Times), Vrio, Wpromote, and FactuPro.
- **Full Stack Engineer — Nisum (Science37)**: Clinical research platform using React, Redux, and TypeScript. Storybook component library.
- **Senior Mainframe COBOL Developer — ICBC**: Anti-Money Laundering systems, COBOL, DB2, CICS.
- **COBOL Developer — ISBAN / BBVA / Accenture**: Enterprise financial batch systems.

## Notable Projects

- **Gmail Clone (REAL Evals)**: Production-ready Gmail replica for AI evaluation. Featured in The New York Times. Built with Next.js and Material UI.
- **DoorDash Clone (REAL Evals)**: High-fidelity food delivery platform clone. Next.js + Material UI.
- **Uber Clone (REAL Evals)**: Ride-sharing platform with real-time map integration. Featured in The New York Times.
- **NFL / NBA / NHL / MLS League Finder (RCX Sports)**: Fantasy league discovery platforms with advanced filtering and real-time data.
- **FactuPro**: Invoice and billing management system for SMBs.

## Education

- National University of Technology (Universidad Tecnológica Nacional), Argentina

## Availability

Open to senior frontend roles, freelance projects, and technical consulting. Available immediately for remote opportunities.
